title: Nordson Corporation Announces Business Segment Realignment Reflecting Diversification and Profitable Growth Focus
text: WESTLAKE, Ohio--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Nordson Corporation (Nasdaq: NDSN) today announced a strategic business segment realignment that reinforces the Company's focus on its long-term profitable growth strategy. The Company will reorganize into three financial reporting segments effective August 1, 2022: Industrial Precision Solutions (IPS) led by Jeffrey A.
